notes: Started it up, played a couple of missions. Everything seems to work. Runs okay, looks good. The one issue I noticed is that there seems to be some kind of opening cinematic or something after you start a new game that just shows a black screen, but a skip prompt appears if you click around.
title: Conglomerate 451
